description: No matter how heavy the cargo, we can transport it to our destination with ease, thanks to Numel.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Team Magma's Numel

description: Camerupt, with its strength against fire, played a big role in rescuing team members.

abilities.name: Burning Draft
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a {F} or {R} Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Flame Ball
attacks.effect: Move a basic Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Team Magma's Camerupt

description: Spheal's Water Gun can put out any fire. Flames used by opponents have no effect!
name: Team Aqua's Spheal

description: It provides support by making paths of ice. It can win any battle as long as it's on ice.

attacks.name: Splatter
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Hail Storm
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Team Magma Pokémon, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Team Aqua's Sealeo

description: It's good at attacks that freeze opponents with a powerful cold snap. Then, it pulverizes a frozen foe with its sharp tusks!

attacks.name: Power Blow
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage times the amount of Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dual Blizzard
attacks.effect: Discard 2 {W} Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Team Aqua's Walrein

abilities.name: Power Saver
abilities.effect: If there are 4 or fewer Team Aqua Pokémon in play, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Aqua Impact
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each {C} in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

description: Its flexible body, which allows it to squeeze into any cracks, comes in handy when invading enemy hideouts.
name: Team Aqua's Grimer

description: It immobilizes its opponents by wrapping them in its huge, poisonous body. It'll smoosh you, too!

abilities.name: Sludge Festival
abilities.effect: The Retreat Cost of each Pokémon in play (except for Team Aqua Pokémon) is {C} more.

attacks.name: Pester
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Team Aqua's Muk

description: Seviper's tail is a sharp blade. It can even poison you!

attacks.name: Venomous Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Venom Tail
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, discard an Energy attached to that Pokémon.

name: Team Aqua's Seviper

description: They all cry out at once to let us know when they spot an enemy. It really helps out!

attacks.name: Telekinesis
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

name: Team Magma's Baltoy

description: Claydol's beam can seize opponents and keep them from moving. Long-range attacks are its specialty!

abilities.name: Magma Switch
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to 1 of your Team Magma Pokémon.

name: Team Magma's Claydol

description: Aron, which even devour metal, can eat and destroy enemy ships in an instant.
name: Team Magma's Aron

description: When Lairon uses Take Down, the impact from its solid body is enough to destroy concrete!

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

name: Team Magma's Lairon

description: Aggron's metal horns can smash through any defenses, no matter how strong!

attacks.name: Rock Stomp
attacks.effect: Discard as many {F} Energy attached to your Pokémon as you like. This attack does 40 damage times the amount of {F} Energy you discarded.

attacks.name: Boulder Storm
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Team Magma's Aggron

abilities.name: Power Saver
abilities.effect: If there are 4 or fewer Team Magma Pokémon in play, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Magma Quake
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 80 more damage.

description: Poochyena can easily detect invading foes with its acute sense of smell. It's an excellent lookout!

attacks.name: Roar
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

name: Team Aqua's Poochyena

description: Poochyena's nose can identify any scent. It's very useful for reconnaissance.

attacks.name: Infiltrate
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals his or her hand.

name: Team Magma's Poochyena

description: Thanks to Mightyena's outstanding leadership, it's very good at combination attacks that can leave a foe helpless.

attacks.name: Teampact
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Team Aqua Pokémon you have in play. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Team Aqua's Mightyena

description: This Pokémon is loyal to its master. It will protect its partner to the end, no matter what.

attacks.name: Hostile Fang
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Team Aqua Pokémon, this attack does 40 more damage.

name: Team Magma's Mightyena

description: You can't keep up with its movements underwater, can you? If you get caught in this whirlpool, there'll be no escape.

attacks.name: Fin Smack
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Team Aqua's Carvanha

description: It boasts fangs so powerful that they knock opponents out in one shot! Enemies that slip up will be taken down without fail!

abilities.name: Aqua Search
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for a Team Aqua Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Team Aqua's Sharpedo

description: Can you handle the formation attack of the fearless Zangoose?

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Team Magma Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Team Magma's Zangoose

name: Double Aqua Energy
